records.display_name: Hudson Link cross-honored

payload.claim_text: Hudson Link fare and parking are cross-honored

records.display_name: Cross-honored fares and parking

payload.claim_text: All fare tickets will be cross-honored. Parking will be cross-honored at five stations (Cortlandt, Beacon, New Hamburg, Poughkeepsie and North White Plains). Free bus and ferry connections for West of Hudson ticket holders. The Hudson Line will operate with additional train cars.
payload.subject: Metro-North accommodations during strike

records.display_name: Cross-honored parking stations

payload.claim_text: Parking will be cross-honored at five stations: Cortlandt, Beacon, New Hamburg, Poughkeepsie and North White Plains
payload.subject: Cross-honored parking stations

records.display_name: Metro-North will monitor ridership

payload.claim_text: Metro-North will monitor ridership to determine additional service needs for shuttle bus or ferry service across the river and train service on Hudson or Harlem Lines
payload.subject: Metro-North ridership monitoring

records.display_name: No West of Hudson service during strike

payload.claim_text: In the event of a strike, there will be no Metro-North West of Hudson service
payload.subject: Metro-North West of Hudson service

records.display_name: Number of morning trains available

payload.claim_text: Choice of 5 morning AM rush trains on Port Jervis Line; Choice of 12 morning AM rush trains from Beacon on Hudson Line; Choice of 9 morning AM rush trains on Pascack Valley Line; Choice of 28 morning AM rush trains from White Plains on Harlem Line
payload.subject: Number of AM rush trains available at each station
